negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_229
prompt: The video opens with a scene set in a well-lit, minimalist room characterized by a light-colored carpet covering the floor. The room features a wooden bookshelf filled with books, vases, scent diffusers, and framed pictures, and a mirror against a corner wall. Several potted plants, including a large monstera plant and smaller leafy greens, are placed in the background on the left side of the video. The walls are painted a neutral beige tone. In the foreground, on top of the carpet, two individuals are engaged in a workout session. The man with a short black beard, dressed in a blue athletic outfit, lies on his back performing sit-ups, lifting his upper body off the ground and then lowering it back down at a consistent speed. The woman assisting is seated on the floor, has an up-do hairstyle, wears a pink and gray sports bra and black leggings, and holds the legs of the exerciser steady. She is face-to-face with the man doing sit-ups. Nearby, a pair of orange resistance bands and a small dumbbell lie on the floor, partially occluded by the woman. As the video progresses, the man continues the sit-up exercise, maintaining a steady rhythm. The assistant remains supportive, ensuring the exerciser's legs are held securely. The scene remains consistent throughout the video, with the same elements and actions persisting. A medium shot captures the interaction between the two individuals, emphasizing their focused expressions and the supportive nature of their workout routine.
